vocab.si terranno: will take place; will be held
vocab.fa: is part of; is included (here: is part of the event)

vocab.ve ne voglio parlare: I want to talk to you about it
vocab.approfondiamo: let's go deeper; let's explore further

vocab.vi aspetto: I'll be waiting for you; I await you

vocab.l'anno successivo: the following year; the next year
vocab.in quell'occasione: on that occasion; at that time

vocab.far partecipare: to have (someone) participate; to let (someone) participate

vocab.stilato: drawn up; compiled (as in a list or ranking)
vocab.messa in premio: put as a prize; offered as a prize
vocab.non era assolutamente piaciuto: was absolutely not liked; was not liked at all

vocab.bulder: boulder (climbing discipline; note: misspelled, should be 'boulder')

vocab.tutta la comunità: the whole community; all the community
vocab.si terranno: will take place; will be held
vocab.sono entrati a far parte: have become part of; have joined

vocab.poter: to be able to; can (infinitive form)

vocab.che hanno a che fare con: who are involved with; who deal with

vocab.bulder: boulder (climbing discipline; note: misspelled, should be 'boulder')
vocab.si sommeranno: will be added; will be summed

vocab.e via di seguito: and so on; and so forth
vocab.iniziamo da: let's start from; we start with

vocab.dovessero: should; if they were to (subjunctive, hypothetical)

vocab.ne: of it; of them (refers back to something previously mentioned)

vocab.sfruttare al massimo: make the most of; exploit to the fullest

vocab.da chiudere: to finish; to complete (context: to solve/finish a problem)

vocab.dovrà essere: will have to be; must be

vocab.Flash: Flash (climbing style: first attempt after observation)
vocab.problema: problem (in climbing: route or boulder problem)

vocab.verranno messi: they will be put; they will be placed
vocab.quella che viene definita: what is called; what is defined as
vocab.ne uscirà uno alla volta: one will come out at a time
vocab.nella finale invece: in the final instead; in the final, however

vocab.che vuole: that he/she wants; as many as he/she wants
vocab.accoppiarlo: grab it with both hands; hold it with both hands

vocab.l'ultima presa: the last hold; the last grip
vocab.accoppiarlo: to match it; to pair it (here: to hold it properly)
vocab.controllarla: to control it; to hold it under control
vocab.chi riesce a tenere: who manages to hold; whoever can hold

vocab.a chiudere: to close; to finish (context: to complete a route/problem)
vocab.top: top (context: the highest hold or finish point in climbing)

vocab.non dovessimo riuscire: if we shouldn't succeed; if we don't manage
vocab.in cima: at the top; to the top
vocab.catena: chain (note: in climbing, may refer to anchor/chain)
vocab.l'arrampicata: the climber; the climbing (note: contextually, 'the climber')

vocab.dovrà: will have to; must (future tense of 'dovere')
vocab.più si sale: the higher you go; the more you climb
vocab.a singola presa: per single hold; for each hold

vocab.per singolo round: per single round; for each round
vocab.potrà essere osservata: can be observed; may be watched

vocab.osservarlo: to observe it; to watch it (masculine object pronoun)
vocab.in modalità Flash: in Flash mode (climbing term: on-sight with beta)
vocab.di averla: of having it (feminine object pronoun, refers to the route/problem)

vocab.riesce ad arrivare: manages to reach; succeeds in reaching

vocab.cima: top; summit (context: climbing, reaching the top)
vocab.in questa specialità: in this specialty; in this discipline
vocab.i due: the two (refers to the two types/disciplines)

vocab.tutta per sé: all for itself; on its own

vocab.metabolismo anaerobico alattacido: alactic anaerobic metabolism (note: specific type of energy system)

vocab.questo determinato percorso: this specific route; this particular path

vocab.fa sì che: ensures that; makes it so that

vocab.un po' di più: a bit more; a little more

vocab.in modo tale che: so that; in such a way that

vocab.approfondirò: I will go deeper; I will elaborate

vocab.da tenere d'occhio: to watch; to keep an eye on

vocab.mettere un Like: to give a Like; to Like

vocab.buona arrampicata: good climbing; have a good climb
